search_query: how to get better at sports
retrieved_result: For Colin Hay, the show must go on following the death of former Men at Work bandmate Greg Ham. The article discusses Colin Hay's solo album Gathering Mercury and his reflections on aging.
Decision_Reason: The page is about a musician and his album, not about sports or improving athletic performance.
query: how to get better at sports
combined_text_for_llm: For Colin Hay, the show must go on following death of former Men at Work bandmate Greg Ham "Print Email By John Soeder, The Plain Dealer Follow on Twitter on May 11, 2012 at 6:05 AM, updated May 11, 2012 at 9:31 AMView full size Martin Smith Ex-Men at Work frontman Colin Hay gets to the point on ""Gathering Mercury,"" his latest solo album. ""As you get older, I think you're always trying
